mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ea_archive_connection_permission ( user_id, datasource_id, permission_level, grant_source, granted_by_user_id, deleted ) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.datasourceId}, #{item.permissionLevel}, #{item.grantSource}, #{item.grantedByUserId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE ea_archive_connection_permission SET deleted = id, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_connection_permission SET deleted = id, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT permission_level FROM ea_archive_connection_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, user_id, datasource_id, permission_level, grant_source, granted_by_user_id, created_time, updated_time, deleted FROM ea_archive_connection_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT datasource_id FROM ea_archive_connection_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND permission_level = #{permissionLevel} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_connection_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND permission_level = #{permissionLevel} AND deleted = 0
